mapper.sql: id, component_id, param_name, param_key, param_type, required, default_value, options, placeholder, sort_order, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO component_param (component_id, param_name, param_key, param_type, required, default_value, options, placeholder, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{componentId}, #{paramName}, #{paramKey}, #{paramType}, #{required}, #{defaultValue}, #{options}, #{placeholder}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())

INSERT INTO component_param (component_id, param_name, param_key, param_type, required, default_value, options, placeholder, sort_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.componentId}, #{item.paramName}, #{item.paramKey}, #{item.paramType}, #{item.required}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.options}, #{item.placeholder}, #{item.sortOrder}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM component_param WHERE component_id = #{componentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
